description: End of a legal document in Arabic script. Might be dated 29 Jumādā I 510 AH, but this is difficult to read and more or less a guess. Mentions a sum of 8 dinars. There are two witness signatures preserved. On verso there are records of receipt of money, some mentioning rent; might be related to the legal document on recto.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
